However, later sources shifted the battle’s date to [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]. Works published around the same time as Characters, such as ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', instead placed the battle in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], which aligns with the timeline presented in [[Empire 8|''Star Wars: Empire'' issue 8]], depicting the mutiny shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. '''Peate Kurin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE pilot]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] until he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a member of [[Twilight Squadron (Rebel)|Twilight Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Kurin was a member of [[Twilight Squadron (Rebel)|Twilight Squadron]] who was stationed on the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']]. He committed mutiny with [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and several of his co-pilots and made their escape until they found [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] as their new [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Kurin joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and was sent by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] on mission to X-Wing starfighters on the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. In the risky mission, he was one of the decoy pilots that bailed out of their [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]]-controlled TIEs to sit floating in space, waiting for pick-up. A stray shot from a passing Imperial fighter struck him in the head, killing him instantly.
